= Reward Packs =
Icons for [[:Category:Reward Pack]]

= Choice Packs =
Packs in which the player gets to choose a reward
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Orange Fungus Choice Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ultimate Crystal Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ultimate Eye Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ultimate Up Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Halloween Choice Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Maneater Choice Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Minion Sim Choice Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Nebula Choice Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Wish Pack I|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Wish Pack II|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Wish Pack III|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Wish Pack IV|orange}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Lottery Choice Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Snailbound Pack|orange}}
|}

= Collection Packs =
Packs in which the player receives a collection of items
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Blasphemy Eye Pack|orange}}||[[Events#Badge_Shop]]
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Singularity Crystal Box|orange}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Event Bonus|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Lottery Bonus|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Rewards Box|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Supervalue Pack I|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|White Gear Pack I|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|White Gear Pack II|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|White Gear Pack III|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|White Gear Pack IV|orange}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Super Pack I|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Supervalue Pack II|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Thank-you Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Club Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Eye of Horus Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Heaven Amulet Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Key Client Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Limited Value Pack I|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Super Pack II|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Super Pack III|orange}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Abyss Amulet Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Crystal of Will Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Limited Value Pack II|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Super Pack IV|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Super Pack V|orange}}
|}

= Random Packs =
Packs that have a random reward

== Alchemy Cases ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Novice Alchemy Case|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Expert Alchemy Case|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Master Alchemy Case|orange}}
|}

== Coating ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Coating Bucket|orange}}
|}

== Lab Boxes ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Assistant Lab Box|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Advanced Lab Box|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Special Lab Box|orange}}
|}

== Protomon Eggs ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Common Protomon Egg|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Rare Protomon Egg|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Epic Protomon Egg|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Mythic Protomon Egg|red}}
|}

== Stardust Boxes ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Stardust Box I|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Stardust Box II|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Stardust Box III|orange}}
|}

== Misc ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ancient Relic Casket|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Collector's Legacy|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Curator's Collection|orange}}||[[Museum#Museum_Shop]]
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Fighter's Legacy}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Hot Cocoa|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Research Briefcase|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Robot Ticket|orange}}
|}

= Relic Albums =
Packs that give a progressive set of predefined Relics.
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Lottery Relic Album|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Wish Relic Album|orange}}
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Reward Pack]]
